items.desc: A handmade crewel curtain scattered with cornflower-blue blooms and meadow flowers across a natural ground. Fresh and gently traditional, it brightens kitchens, studies and garden rooms.

items.desc: A handmade crewel curtain densely embroidered with crimson and olive florals on an ivory ground. A statement of classic Kashmiri craftsmanship, it anchors a room with colour and intricate detail.

items.title: Charcoal Vine
items.desc: A handmade crewel curtain in graphic charcoal florals on a crisp white ground. Monochrome and modern, it pairs effortlessly with contemporary interiors while keeping the warmth of hand embroidery.

items.title: Olive & Walnut Vine
items.desc: A handmade crewel curtain with walnut-brown vines and olive-gold blossoms winding across an ivory ground. Earthy and refined, it complements natural woods and neutral palettes.

items.title: Ivory Scroll Vine
items.desc: A handmade crewel curtain with a fine green scrolling vine and tiny multicoloured flowers over an ivory ground. Delicate and versatile, it brings a light, botanical touch to any window.

items.title: Walnut Vine
